sql_array: CREATE TABLE events (event_id INTEGER, event_time TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO events (event_id, event_time) VALUES (1, localtimestamp);
UPDATE events SET event_time = localtimestamp WHERE event_id = 1;
SELECT event_id, event_time FROM events WHERE event_time > localtimestamp - INTERVAL '1 hour';
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM events WHERE event_time BETWEEN localtimestamp - INTERVAL '1 day' AND localtimestamp;
